title: Wrangler's unstable_startWorker()
excerpt: title: Wrangler's unstable_startWorker() description: Write integration tests using Wrangler's `unstable_startWorker()` API image: https://developers.cloudflare.com/dev-products-preview.png > Fetch the complete documentation index at: https://developers.cloudflare.com/workers/llms.txt > Use this file to discover all available pages before exploring further. For most users, Cloudflare recommends using the Workers Vitest integration. If you have been using `unstable_dev()`, refer to the [Migrate from unstable\_dev() guide](https://developers.cloudflare.com/workers/testing/vitest-integration/migration-guides/migrate-from-unstable-dev/).
